title: Point93 - Assessment Platform

links.text: NextGen Ready Not Started When your clients' children inherit, will they keep you? Research shows 80-90% of heirs fire their parents' advisor after inheritance. NextGen Ready analyzes whether you're positioned to retain wealth across generations—or whether you're building a practice that ends when your clients do. 5 questions 4 stages Begin assessment to get your score

Client Referrals Not Started Your best clients know people just like them. Are they talking about you? Client referrals don't happen because clients are satisfied—they happen because clients can articulate your value, feel confident staking their reputation, and think of you at the right moment. 0 questions 4 stages Begin assessment to get your score

PitchPerfect Not Started When it matters, can you win? Prospects often meet with multiple advisors or are comparing you to a relationship they already have. PitchPerfect analyzes how your pitch performs across critical moments where you're either creating separation from alternatives—or giving them reasons to look elsewhere. 0 questions 7 stages Begin assessment to get your score

COI Referrals Not Started You pursue CPAs and attorneys through formal meetings. How positioned are you to turn those meetings into referral relationships? 3 questions 5 stages Begin assessment to get your score

Client Retention Risk Not Started Analyzes patterns across your practice that either lock clients in or leave them vulnerable to competitors, drift, and silent disengagement. 0 questions 5 stages Begin assessment to get your score
